name: harness-engineering
description: Adds the harness-engineering skill for making repositories agent-ready and diagnosing why coding agents fail to finish real tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Make repos agent-ready and diagnose failed agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: Harness Engineering helps agents improve the instructions, environment, state, verification, and feedback loops around a repository so coding agents can finish real tasks reliably.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use harness-engineering to make this repo agent-ready.
